Rundown of what changed when Bootstrap 4 upgraded to Bootstrap 5.
On June 16 2020, Bootstrap announced the upgrade on their blog.
This release was hotly anticipated. Why?
Bootstrap no longer depends on jQuery and we've dropped support for Internet Explorer.
In short — Bootstrap 5 no longer depends on jQuery and dropped support for

Quickly design and customize responsive mobile-first sites with Bootstrap, the world's most popular front-end open source toolkit, featuring Sass variables and mixins, responsive grid system, extensive prebuilt components, and powerful JavaScript plugins.
